commands: git diff --cached --binary HEAD -- crates | git hash-object --stdin

focused_regressions.proves: Successful Senior SWE-Bench local-wrapper fitness reports include all_tests_pass, hidden_acceptance, and has_no_solution_search_policy_declared while no longer emitting the ambiguous has_no_solution_search label.

Failed local evaluator reports remain regressing/non-acceptable even when no-search policy was declared, and they also use the scoped policy label instead of the ambiguous label. The test also serializes an a2d.fitness-evidence.v1 artifact for the failed report and asserts non_regressing=false with failed_cases [all_tests_pass, hidden_acceptance].

scope_note: This slice corrects Senior SWE-Bench fitness evidence terminology. has_no_solution_search_policy_declared means policy metadata and env propagation are present; it does not enforce OS/network isolation or prove no public network egress. This is source-patch evidence plus focused label/regression tests, not official Senior SWE-Bench mastery evidence. Focused failed-evaluator coverage verifies the local-wrapper failure evidence path is non_regressing=false; the committed source-patch gate evidence is the separate full-passing Sudoku score-artifact replay.
